notes: Added release notes directly to app, easiest place to track changes
Recursive naming option now applies to the menu builder code, critical for menu items sharing same name.
Fixes an issue when building for eInk displays with all-in-one mode.
Fixes an issue with the base theme for palettes.
Revised front page that helps new users to get started, a few small UI/UX improvements.
Problem with theme builder when not using dynamic eeprom.
Problem with custom scroll-choice and lists in theme builder.
Start new project wizard now starts with the counter starter loaded into tree
Start new project now defaults to menu builder in your sketch.
The counter starter if detected, will add a callback that updates the analog item
Code generator now fully supports putting menu builder code directly in the INO/main.
All server-side dependencies brought up to date.
